title: Smp Start
description: A plugin that adds a cool start to your smp
body:
✨ SMP Start ✨

SMP Start is a fully customizable Minecraft plugin made to deliver an epic and cinematic beginning for your SMP server 🚀

⚡ What happens when you run /smpstart?

🔹 A powerful lightning strike hits a configurable location
    ➡ Default: 0 0

🔹 A huge explosion of particles fills the area ✨

🔹 All players within a 10-block radius of (0, 0) are launched in the direction they are looking 💨

🔹 Players receive Slow Falling 🪶
    ➡ Effect lasts until they touch the ground, keeping them safe

🛡️ Grace Period System

🟢 Starts automatically after the command
🟢 Players receive Saturation II by default 🍗
🟢 Ensures a fair and balanced start for everyone

⚙️ Fully Configurable

Everything can be customized in config.yml 🔧

✔ Lightning strike location
✔ Particle type & amount ✨
✔ Launch power 🚀
✔ Slow Falling duration 🪶
✔ Grace period length ⏳
✔ Saturation level 🍖
✔ Command permissions 🔐

🎮 Perfect for:
⭐ SMP launches
⭐ World resets
⭐ Special server events

SMP Start turns your server’s beginning into a memorable, powerful, and fair experience 💥🔥
